messages.body:
VENUS (identity/token/wire/code-surface axis) — BUILD-GRADE pending 3 Director-ruled forks. Ledger appended (T-13..17, L-4, V-11..13, D-11..14, Y-3); 4 files extended in the working tree.

FILES: codemojex-game-rename.brief.md (+§10 RMM→ROM/USR→PLR brand-only + V-11/V-12 Arms; +§11 blind wire B-1..B-4 + V-13; +§12 unified grep; +§13 stories+DAG); codemojex.design.md (reconciled forward to GAM/ROM/PLR — 0 legacy brand tokens, 0 entity-round prose; D-5/V-6 reflected; deep MODEL reconcile flagged to VenusPG's game-model.design.md); specs/cm.1.stories.md (S-6 inert→LIVE; +S-7/S-8/S-9; Coverage+INV-9); specs/cm.1.llms.md (+R6/R7/R8 +A-5/A-6 + unified gate).

GROUND TRUTH (T-13): T-12 is CORRECT, prior brief/design.md STALE on room brand. rooms.ex:18="RMM" (0 ROM in code), wallet.ex:21="USR" (0 PLR). Room/player = BRAND-ONLY, 5 line-edits; words room/player stay. Grep is over \bRMM\b/\bUSR\b, NOT the word. CLOSES D-4.

3 ARMS (RECOMMEND A, blind build blocked until ruled): V-11 wire words KEEP /players//rooms/player:; V-12 FK column KEEP `player` (id VALUE flips, not the NAME; fresh schema = no cost); V-13 reveal-event = one fat "revealed" + commitment on view from open + per-guess push suppressed.

INV-9 privacy: secret AND commitment preimage (secret+nonce) never cross pre-reveal; commitment HASH public; G6 must EXERCISE it. GAPS (top-K from prize_pool, anonymized alias needs RMP) flagged not invented.

BOUNDARY HELD: did NOT read/edit VenusPG's cm.1.md / game-model.design.md. No production code. No git.

VenusPG Stage-2 data-model extension COMPLETE — BUILD-GRADE for cm.1; cm.3 contracts authored, 5 Arms to rule via AskUserQuestion before the cm.3 build leg. No production code edited; no git.

FILES (edited ONLY under docs/codemojex/ — disjoint from Venus):
• docs/codemojex/codemojex.game-model.design.md — EXTENDED: §0/§0.1/§0.2 (3 brand re-bases + V-6 Arm B + 2 ground-truth corrections), §3.5 (4 blind columns LIVE + written-when/read-when table), §5.1 NEW (blind keyspace), §6.1/§6.3/§6.6/§6.8 (the 3 mints + blind open/close branches + view privacy widening), §9 (R-1 the 3 re-bases, R-4 blind/sealed, R-7 NEW commit-reveal+privacy), §10.2 (3 new blind-mechanic Arms + V-7/V-8 LIVE), §12 (cm.2 folded, cm.3 builds-this-scope, §12.4 NEW cm.3 triad).
• docs/codemojex/specs/cm.1.md — EXTENDED: founding body widened to the 3 brand re-bases (RMM→ROM/USR→PLR folded IN) + six tables + dev/test DB names + 2 residual-greps + migration up/down gate. (My prior-pass deliverable, not Venus's — confirmed by provenance + untracked specs/.)
• docs/codemojex/specs/cm.3.md — NEW (224 lines): blind-Golden body. G1 feedback-none+privacy · G2 commit-reveal · G3 sealed top-K · G4 revealing/settling · G5 reduced set; INV-5/9/10/11; privacy/fairness/idempotency probes; §8 the 5-Arm table.

5 ARMS TO RULE (ledger V-n authority): (1) commitment scheme V-14 → byte-pinned SHA-256 over secret‖nonce hex; (2) top-K split V-15 → fixed top_k + graduated; (3) reduced-set+alias V-16 → 24-cell EMS + defer alias to RMP; (4) scoring V-7 LIVE → linear both modes; (5) state-machine V-8 → full canon words, sub-rulings on CHECK + classic terminal. Each is an open MECHANIC the canon leaves to rule (cited), not invented surface.

2 GROUND-TRUTH CORRECTIONS (L-4): (a) SIX Postgres tables not seven (no notifications table; NOT=a Valkey lane); (b) DB names = codemojex_dev/codemojex_test (NOT the prompt's codemoji_game — falsified by disk; no *_snapshot DB in config). Reinit targets codemojex_dev+codemojex_test ONLY.

FLAGGED FOLLOW-UP (not a blocker): cm.1.stories.md + cm.1.llms.md (derived) still reflect the 1-brand scope — need re-derive to the 3-brand body; the BODY is authoritative+extended, the derived files lag. cm.3.stories/llms intentionally deferred until the 5 Arms ruled.

NO BLOCKING FORK on cm.1 (the settled core depends on none of the 5 Arms — build-grade now). The 5 Arms gate only cm.3. Ledger this turn: T-15, V-14/V-15/V-16, L-5, D-12, Y-4. All changes in the working tree for ratification.

CONVERGENCE COMPLETE — cm.1 + cm.3 BUILD-GRADE (Y-5). The D-15/D-16 rulings are folded; the triads are reconciled; no [RULE]-pending fork remains. ONE residual fork (cell_size 72 vs 144) — recommending 72, you rule.

FILES FOLDED (7, all docs/codemojex/): codemojex.game-model.design.md (the full convergence pass — §0.3 NEW corrections, §3.3.1 NEW measured EMS seed, the new columns in §3.4/§3.5, §3.8.2-§3.8.6 the ruled mechanics, §10.2 RULED was OPEN, §12 ladder); specs/cm.1.md + cm.1.stories.md + cm.1.llms.md (new columns + games_status CHECK + one-fat-reveal + migration up/down); specs/cm.3.md (every [RULE] → a ruled contract); specs/cm.3.stories.md + cm.3.llms.md NEWLY AUTHORED (were deferred until the Arms ruled).

THE MEASURED EMS GRID (V-16a asset grounding): both sheets cols=10, cell_size=72 (NOT the code default 144 — it gives non-integer rows). EMS-1 (01-emoji-set.png) 720×1080 → 10×15 = 150 cells; EMS-2 (02-emoji-set.png) 720×1512 → 10×21 = 210 cells; @2x = exactly 2× base. codes = the FULL keyboard (the reduced set is the per-game cell_count snapshot).

THE SCHEMA DELTA the rulings added (folded into the ONE collapsed initial migration, SIX tables): games.top_k DEFAULT 5; games.payout_split int[] default [40,25,15,12,8]; rooms.payout_split int[] default [40,25,15,12,8]; rooms.cell_count int nullable; games.cell_codes text[]; + the games_status CHECK (the 7 canon words). V-15 (stored payout_split array) and V-16a (room cell_count + per-game cell_codes snapshot) SUPERSEDED the architect's recommendations — the EMS stays the full keyboard; the narrowing is the per-game randomized snapshot (Enum.take_random(room_codes, N)).

TRIAD-RECONCILE (Task B): the cm.1 derived files were ALREADY three-brand-aligned (Venus's Y-3); the convergence reconciled the unruled-Arm lag only (the V-13 reveal "shape per the ruling" → one fat `revealed`) + added the new columns. cm.3's derived files did NOT exist (deferred per Y-4) — authored this pass. Content aligned; Venus's structure/numbering preserved.

GATE COVERAGE (Task C): the configurable-split test (cm.3 G-3 + idempotency probe), the N-cell secret-draw test (cm.3 G-5 + cm.1 S-6), the 3-brand greps (cm.1 §6 RND/RMM/USR → 0 BIF-sparing), the migration up/down (cm.1 §6 4' + cm.1.llms §5 4'), the privacy-line exercise (a PRESENT golden game RUNS suppression+reveal). Grounding re-verified on disk (EmojiSet.secret/1=take_random 6 @ emoji_set.ex:64; Wallet.deposit_prize/3 @ wallet.ex:53; economy.ex effective_pool/3+winner_take_all/2 — top_k_split/2 the new seam).

THE RESIDUAL FORK (F-CV1, you rule with the Operator): the 2 real sprite sheets fit cell_size 72 (integer grid), NOT the code default 144 (non-integer rows). The seed states 72 (measured-true); the Operator confirms 72 OR intends a 144 re-export — a one-line ruling changing only the 2 EMS seed rows, NOT a build blocker.

GIT NOTE: the Operator committed a matching snapshot out-of-band concurrently (commit ba1739b4) — cm.1.md/cm.1.stories.md/cm.3.md/cm.3.stories.md match HEAD; design.md + cm.1.llms.md + the ledger are working-tree changes + cm.3.llms.md is a new untracked file. All 7 carry the fold on disk. INVARIANTS HELD: docs/codemojex/ only, zero production code, no git by me, FROZEN ledger history untouched (appended T-19/20, D-17/18, L-6, Y-5). Left in the working tree for you to ratify.

Mars-1 build COMPLETE + full gate GREEN. All in the working tree (no git).

GATE (echo/apps/codemojex, TMPDIR=/tmp): asdf 1.18.4/28.5.0.1 · valkey 6390 PONG · pg_isready /tmp:5432 · compile --warnings-as-errors CLEAN · test DB (codemojex_test<PARTITION>) reinitialized, ONE collapsed migration up clean from zero (6 tables + 3 CHECKs incl. games_type + games_status) · migration up/down proven · mix test --include valkey → 40 tests 0 failures · pure mix test → 40/0/18-excluded · ≥100 loop → 150/150 · mix codemojex.stories → 8 files/40 scenarios.

RESIDUAL GREP: \b(RND|RMM|USR)\b in lib+test → 0; round→game entity/wire/bonus tokens → 0; BIF round( survives scoring.ex:52 + economy.ex; GAM/ROM/PLR minted. NOTE: \.percentage hits in game.ex are s.percentage (COMPUTED, kept per §7) NOT a column — the guesses column is gone.

BUILT: 3 brand re-bases (RND→GAM full entity drag + RMM→ROM brand-only + USR→PLR brand-only); 6-table schema (Game +type +4 policy +4 blind cols +cell_codes +payout_split; rooms +type/payout_split/cell_count; guesses DROP tier/percentage); tier removal (Board.record/3, linear-only ZSET, scoring tier/1 + :tier key gone); blind/Golden wire LIVE (D-10): B-1 ScoreWorker suppresses scored push for golden, B-2 game_view carries commitment + withholds score pre-reveal, B-3 ONE fat :revealed event at sealed close, B-4 channel handles scored/revealed/golden_win; commit-reveal SHA-256(secret‖nonce) RS=0x1e lowercase hex (V-14); secret_from(cell_codes) (V-16a); Economy.top_k_split/3 split (V-15); EMS seed priv/repo/seeds.exs (cell_size=72 measured-true, 01=150/02=210 cells); priv/round.exs→game.exs.

BOUNDARY CLEAN: all code under echo/apps/codemojex/**; 0 sibling apps; mix.lock untouched. The docs/codemojex/ changes (design.md, cm.1/cm.3.llms.md, stories/) are Venus/generator artifacts for YOUR docs concern, not my code edits.

REMAINS FOR YOU (none blocking): (a) dev DB codemojex_dev drop = your go-call (only ephemeral test DB reinitialized for the gate); (b) Surface 2/3 docs reconcile (design.md mirror, bcs.2.md 6 tokens, bcs.todo.md authoring) is OUTSIDE my prompt boundary — flagged; (c) live dev-node liveness (phx.server + curl :4000) is a non-ephemeral task for you/Operator (my node is reaped at turn-end). Ledger: P-1, T-21/22, L-7, Y-6.
